name: second-brain
description: Knowledge Base tools for Daniel's Second Brain (WELTENERNEUERER vault). Two skills: (1) Second Brain Setup & Audit — sets up or audits Obsidian vaults using the Three Brains framework (Setup mode for fresh vaults, Audit mode for existing vaults with migration plan); (2) Knowledge Ingest — drop any URL or YouTube transcript and it is automatically fetched via Tavily, summarised, wikilinked, and routed to the right Knowledge Base subfolder with thinker profiles created or updated automatically.
